steps.title: Read the compliment
steps.content: The speaker says there is no better example than Brian Collier's work. The blank therefore needs a verb meaning surpassed or outshone, because the sentence is saying no illustrator has done better.

steps.title: Reject unrelated verbs
steps.content: Choice A means mentioned as evidence or an example. Choice C means added to or increased. Choice D means gathered people together. None expresses surpassing another artist's work. The answer is B.
